race.comment: BAROSSA VALLEY (1) had his first look here last time in a similar race and sat close to the speed before boxing on well for third. Doesn't have to improve much to go close again. REPRESENTATIVE (12) was slow to begin and did everything wrong on debut over 1400m on the synthetic at Pakenham. Fitter, better for the experience and the extra trip is a plus. Can improve out of sight. KOVU (6) has been thereabouts and although yet to place in 12 starts has run some good races, like a fast finishing fifth here last time coming from well back. Worth including. GAELIC KIWI (4) was fourth here last time and is among the chances.
